title: Neodeutzia mexicana
taxonomy: Neodeutzia mexicana is classified within the family Hydrangeaceae, commonly known as the hydrangea family. This family comprises flowering plants that are primarily shrubs or shrub-like perennials. Neodeutzia mexicana, being part of this family, is likely to have similar growth habits and characteristics to its relatives. The plant's classification is further specified within the genus Neodeutzia, a group of flowering plants native to Central America. As a member of the Hydrangeaceae family, Neodeutzia mexicana is closely related to other hydrangea-like plants.
